zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Giles de Braose Lord Stinton於1273年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可艾爾善姆時，他的父親Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor42歲，母親Alice le Rus28歲。他於1292年與Margaret在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他去世於1310年2月6日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾盧德波洛享年37歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾盧斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Giles de Braose Lord Stinton于1273年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可艾爾善姆时，他的父亲Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor42岁，母亲Alice le Rus28岁。他于1292年与Margaret在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他去世于1310年2月6日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾盧德波洛享年37岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾盧斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Braose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Eckhard, Gerhard, Manfred, Otto.
from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).

variants.name: Ambrose
meanings: English and Scottish: from the personal name Ambrose (French Ambroise, Latin Ambrosius, from Greek ambrosios ‘immortal, divine’), which was popular throughout Christendom in medieval Europe. Its popularity was due in part to the fame of Saint Ambrose (c. 340–397), one of the four Latin Fathers of the Church, the teacher of Saint Augustine. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech, Slovenian, and Croatian Ambrož (see Ambroz ), and also their derivatives, e.g. the Slovenian patronymic Ambrožič.
Irish: from Mac Ambróis ‘son of Ambrose’ (see 1 above); a West Munster name, which has also been Anglicized as McCambridge .

nameMeanings.name: Giles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Much altered English vernacular form of the Late Latin name Aegidius, from Greek Aigidios (a derivative of aigidion ‘kid, young goat’), via Old French Gide. It was the name of an 8th‐century saint who, according to tradition, was an Athenian citizen who fled to Provence because he could not cope with the fame and adulation caused by his power to work miracles, in particular by healing the lame and crippled. This was not a particularly common name in the Middle Ages and its use seems to have been confined to certain families and localities.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Giles de Braose Lord Stinton was born in 1273, in Aylsham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor, was 42 and his mother, Alice le Rus, was 28. He married Margaret in 1292, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. He died on 6 February 1310, in Ludborough, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37, and was buried in Louth, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Giles de Braose Lord Stinton est né en 1273, à Aylsham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Alice le Rus, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Margaret en 1292, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 6 février 1310, à Ludborough, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Louth, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Giles de Braose Lord Stinton 1273 in Aylsham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor 42 und seine Mutter Alice le Rus 28. Er hat 1292 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Margaret geheiratet. Er starb am 6. Februar 1310 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Ludborough, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Louth, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Giles de Braose Lord Stinton è nato il nel 1273 nel Aylsham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Alice le Rus, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Margaret nel 1292, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 6 febbraio 1310, nel Ludborough, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Louth, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Giles de Braose Lord Stintonが1273年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクエイルシャムで生まれた時，父Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manorは42歳，母Alice le Rusは28歳であった。1292年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでMargaretと結婚した。彼は1310年2月6日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアルドボロウで37歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアロウスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Giles de Braose Lord Stinton(이)가 1273년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 아이샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice le Rus(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1292년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Margaret(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1310년 2월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 루드버루에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 루스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Giles de Braose Lord Stinton nasceu em 1273, em Aylsham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Alice le Rus, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret em 1292, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 6 de fevereiro de 1310, em Ludborough, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Louth, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Giles de Braose Lord Stinton родился в 1273 г. в местности аилшам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Alice le Rus, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret в 1292 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 6 февраля 1310 г. в местности лудбороую, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности лоут, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Giles de Braose Lord Stinton nació en 1273, en Aylsham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Alice le Rus, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Margaret en 1292, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 6 de febrero de 1310, en Ludborough, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Louth, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
